sources.label: StockTitan KRKNF news timeline (no June 2026 releases after May 6 MoU)
Ad-hoc-news (Jun 4, 2026): Q1 2026 results, $262M backlog, Covelya close on track for end of Q2

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6: Q1 results (rev +35% to C$21.7M, C$262M backlog, guidance reaffirmed) landed ~June 3-4 and were already in yesterday's hold. Today's -2.7% drift on no news, with the Covelya close still pending end-of-June, marginally improves asymmetry without changing the scaling-watchlist setup.
verdicts.bull: C$615M Covelya acquisition closes by end of June, tripling profitable revenue base and lifting combined backlog past C$262M; subsea defence demand (KATFISH, synthetic aperture sonar, subsea batteries) gives a real autonomous-sensing bottleneck position.
verdicts.neutral: Stock is digesting a C$402.5M equity raise and a Q1 net loss with EBITDA margin compression (17% to 14%); until consolidated post-Covelya guidance is issued, the name trades sideways on flow rather than fundamentals.
verdicts.bear: Covelya close slips or integration of a ~1,200-person combined entity strains a C$1.8B small-cap; margin compression persists and the dilutive raise caps near-term upside if defence order momentum stalls.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Covelya acquisition closing by end of Q2 2026 plus first consolidated guidance for the combined entity.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Deal-close slippage or integration/margin disappointment after the dilutive C$402.5M financing.
